// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.ServiceA, global::TestNamespace.ServiceA>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IServiceA>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.ServiceA>());
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.ServiceB, global::TestNamespace.ServiceB>();
            services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.IServiceB>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.ServiceB>());
            services.AddTransient<global::TestNamespace.ServiceC, global::TestNamespace.ServiceC>();
            services.AddTransient<global::TestNamespace.IServiceC>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.ServiceC>());

            return services;
        }
    }
}
